dataset.note: Computed from full-year replays per scenario; rolling windows are sliced by entry timestamp.

assumptions.selectionUniverseNote: In-scope deployed-neighborhood scenarios from Task A sweeps (CBP + guarded).
assumptions.selectionRanking: sort by netR desc, then profitFactor desc, then maxDrawdownR asc, then trades desc, then winRate desc; choose top eligible by DD gate, fallback to top overall
